message.content:
@startuml
participant "user" as u1
participant "user" as u2
participant "application" as app1
participant "application" as app2
database "DB" as db1
database "DB" as db2

u1 ..> app1 : request
app1 ..> db1 : retrieve by id
db1 ..> app1 : response

app2 ..> app1 : request
app1 ..> db1 : retrieve by id
db1 ..> app1 : response

@enduml
